violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. No serve safe employee

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Cut meat in zip bags without date or label.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. Cooking utensils, plates not covered or inverted.
